candidate_definition_hints.text: GIF is a photorealistic generative face model with explicit 3D geometric and photometric control.
This is the official implementation for the paper [GIF: Generative Interpretable Faces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2009.00149).

candidate_glosses.text: This is the official implementation for the paper [GIF: Generative Interpretable Faces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2009.00149).
